columns.name: t1d_stage
unique_values: At-risk: single or transient autoantibody, normal glucose level
Stage 1: two or more autoantibodies, normal glucose metabolism level
Stage 2: two or more autoantibodies, dysglycemia (e.g., HbA1c ‚â• 5.7%)
Stage 3: one or more autoantibodies and diagnostic hyperglycemia or T1D diagnosis

columns.name: definition
unique_values: A chronic condition characterized by minimal or absent production of insulin by the pancreas.
A chronic metabolic disease characterized by hyperglycemia resulting from insulin resistance and relative insulin deficiency.
Absence of disease or major pathological findings in the donor or sample metadata.
